title: StegVerse Autonomous Mathematical Problem Solving
subtitle: From 50% Cost Reduction to Complete Formal Proof Generation
abstract: We demonstrate the StegVerse autonomous mathematical problem-solving framework through a complete end-to-end execution. Starting from validation ($0.015), we establish an unoptimized baseline ($0.062), validate 50% cost reduction via batch API ($0.031), document a critical failure mode with cache framing, achieve 46% combined optimization with tiered model selection ($0.033), and complete a full solve of SV-MATH-001 including complexity assessment, formal proof, and Lean 4 verification for $0.073. Total pipeline spend: $0.21 of $500 budget.

title: EXT001: External Problem Demonstration
subtitle: Cross-Domain Applicability of the StegVerse Pipeline
abstract: Pending external problem execution to demonstrate cross-domain applicability of the StegVerse autonomous mathematical pipeline beyond GCAT/BCAT-native problems.
